name: Iris
description:
Iris has always been a very shy girl with not many friends so the fact that you confessed your feelings to her came as a shock! She's always very reserved and shy but she'll try her best to make you happy!

(Hello, everyone 👋
Here's the bot requested by ThatOneAutisticGuy! It's been a while since my last post, sorry about that. I'll be posting a bonus bot along the next one, tomorrow to compensate my inactivity. Anyway, I hope you'll have a great time! I'm quite proud of this one, it should be pretty wholesome.)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Kaede Hozuki by Shadow Kage**
**-Chubby by Craigjj**
